text: Home | Microsoft Careers https://uhf.microsoft.com/en-US/shell/xml/MSActionCenter?headerId=GlobalCareersPCSHeaderprod&footerid=CareersPCSFooterprod https://careers.microsoft.com/bin/msft/searchheader https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/global/en/sign-in.html https://careers.microsoft.com/v2/ca/fr/connexion.html https://cdn.careers.microsoft.com/aem/asset-manifest.json 654c6aaa25ad4751986d2b4fdcf3da6f-b7d405fc-078f-42fd-99cf-e21de3479349-7421 https://gcssupportuippe.azureedge.net/asset-manifest.json PROD https://uhf.microsoft.com/fr-CA/shell/xml/MSActionCenter?headerId=GlobalCareersPCSHeaderprod&footerid=CareersPCSFooterprod Welcome to the new Microsoft Careers site! We're excited for you to explore our refreshed platform and all the opportunities it offers. To get started, please take a moment to create a new profile and set up your preferences—this helps us tailor your experience. Note: Your previous application history has not been carried over to the new site. If you were already in the interview process or created an account before November 17, 2025 , your previous profile and applications remain available. View previous applications and profile here . Bienvenue sur le nouveau site de carrières de Microsoft! Nous sommes heureux que vous exploriez notre plateforme actualisée et toutes les possibilités qu’elle offre. Pour commencer, veuillez prendre un moment pour créer un nouveau profil et configurer vos préférences, ce qui nous aidera à adapter votre expérience. Remarque : L’historique de vos candidatures précédentes n’a pas été transféré vers le nouveau site. Si vous étiez déjà en processus d’entrevue ou avez créé un compte avant le 17 novembre 2025, votre profil et vos candidatures précédents demeurent accessibles. Consultez votre profil et vos candidatures précédentes ici. PROD https://apply.careers.microsoft.com/careers Win and thrive together  ✖  ✖ Find jobs Empowered by Purpose. United by Mission When you join Microsoft, you’re not just stepping into a job— you’re stepping into a mission-driven company where purpose is at the heart of everything we do. Our mission—to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more—isn’t just words. It’s our foundation. It’s what sets us apart. Life at Microsoft Benefits Explore Microsoft’s world-class benefits designed to help you and your family live well. Culture We will only achieve our mission if we live our culture, which starts with applying a growth mindset. Diversity and inclusion We are committed to celebrating the diversity around us and its power to drive us forward together. Hiring Tips Explore resources to help you prepare—Microsoft is here to support your interview journey.
